title: Energy Guard Functions
description: Create reusable functions to abstract energy and battery management - write it once, use it everywhere!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Your function library is great, but there's a problem—your functions don't check if you have enough energy before acting!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Oh no! So if my energy runs out mid-farming, my functions will fail?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Let's create ensure_energy(threshold) - a function that checks energy, goes to the food station if needed, and returns when ready!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can add this to my other functions to make them safer?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Precisely! This is abstraction—hiding complexity behind a simple interface!

objectives.description: Define the ensure_energy function with a 'threshold' parameter
Check current energy in the function (get_energy()['energy'])
Navigate to food station if needed

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now you can call ensure_energy(50) before any operation and never worry about running out!

phases.title: Complete Farm Function
phases.description: Combine all mechanics into one function

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now create smart_farm(x, y) - it handles energy, movement, and farming!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: This function should: check energy, move to position, scan the plot, and farm appropriately.

objectives.description: Define smart_farm with parameters, x and y

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Brilliant! Now farming any plot is just one function call. This is professional code organization!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Final challenge: create a complete library of farming functions. Then use them to farm plots effortlessly!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Your library should have: ensure_energy(), ensure_battery(), smart_farm(), and batch_farm(positions)!

objectives.description: Create batch_farm function for multiple positions

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Incredible! You've created a complete farming library. This code is reusable, maintainable, and elegant!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: And I can use these functions too! This makes human-robot coordination so much easier!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: You've mastered the game mechanics AND programming concepts. You're ready for the ultimate challenges!
